INDEX_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Welcome to my personal blog! Here, I share my thoughts and discoveries on topics like React, MobX, Tailwind, and anything related to JavaScript and web development. This blog is more of a playground where I test out new ideas and approaches. But who knows — maybe something here will be useful to you.
